variants.angle: everyone blames mercury for the week's chaos and this issues the paperwork with your own receipts

variants.newElement: a reading of how you actually communicate
variants.angle: the retrograde panic points everyone at their own texting and memory can actually answer

variants.newElement: an official looking excuse note you can send
variants.angle: the blame ritual everyone already performs gets a document and a tag chain

briefs.audience: people already joking that mercury broke their week
briefs.insight: the blame is ambient and communal, and nobody has receipts; a report built from your own drafts makes the joke personal
briefs.assetXElement: your drafts and typos x an official retrograde damage report
briefs.successMetric: generation to share rate within the retrograde window

referenceSet.note: official document parody format, personal receipts as the punchline; entertainment framing, no health or finance advice

generationPrompts.image: An official looking document titled RETROGRADE DAMAGE REPORT on a desk, stamped and annotated, listing comic entries like unsent drafts and autocorrect incidents, warm lamp light, paper texture, editorial photography, subtle grain. No logos, no watermarks. 16:9.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 a phone with a chaotic drafts folder; shot 2 the damage report prints line by line; shot 3 the stamp lands and the hook line appears, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, deadpan tone about finally having paperwork for the chaos, no exclamation marks

briefs.audience: people who half believe the retrograde and fully believe their own texting is chaos
briefs.insight: retrograde season makes communication the topic, and chat memory is the one archive that can describe yours truthfully
briefs.assetXElement: your chat history x a reading of how you actually communicate
briefs.successMetric: 7 day share rate of the reading card

referenceSet.note: self insight card format, personal data rendered back to the person; entertainment framing

generationPrompts.image: A elegant reading card laid on linen, titled THE WAY YOU TEXT, with a few short observed lines and a small constellation motif, soft morning light, editorial photography, generous negative space, subtle grain. No logos, no watermarks. 16:9.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 a chat thread scrolling; shot 2 lines lift off the thread and settle into the reading card; shot 3 the card tilts to camera and the hook line lands, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, about being read accurately for once, restrained tone, no exclamation marks

briefs.audience: friend groups already tagging each other about mercury
briefs.insight: blaming the retrograde is a shared ritual, and a document makes the ritual sendable
briefs.assetXElement: blaming mercury retrograde x an official looking excuse note you can send
briefs.successMetric: tag chain length per seeded note

referenceSet.note: pass it on chain format, the artifact names its next recipient

generationPrompts.image: An official looking excuse note card, formal typography reading OFFICIAL RETROGRADE EXCUSE with a blank line for a name and a wax style seal, held between two fingers against a kitchen backdrop, phone camera realism, natural light. No logos, no watermarks. 16:9.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 the excuse note fills in a friend's name; shot 2 it sends and the friend reacts; shot 3 the note regenerates with a blank name and the hook line lands, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, granting official permission to blame the planet, deadpan tone, no exclamation marks

decided.reason: last-3-day average CTR 0.0005 fell below the preregistered killAt 0.015: verdict: kill
last-3-day average CTR 0.0384 reached the preregistered scaleAt 0.035: verdict: scale
last-3-day average CTR 0.0348 sits between killAt and scaleAt, slope has not tripped the fatigue threshold: verdict: iterate

injectedLearnings: Winning traits from wave 4: thing asset "your parents' wedding photo" + angleType=evergreen + HOOK=THEC. Prioritize reusing these asset shapes and angleType combinations in new variants.
